command:
gh pr edit 25 --body ## Summary

Sweeps resting potential from -90 to -20 mV in 10 mV steps across two DSGC compartmental-model ports (t0022 deterministic, t0024 AR(2) rho=0.6 stochastic) and exports per-(model, V_rest) polar tuning curves plus per-model overlay plots and quantitative direction-selectivity / peak-firing / HWHM tables.

## Key findings

* **t0022** (deterministic, ModelDB 189347): DSI rises from 0.49 at V=-90 to a 0.66 peak at V=-60, then collapses to 0.05 at V=-30 due to Na channel inactivation. Tuning HWHM widens from <1 deg at V<=-80 to 180 deg (no tuning) at V=-30.
* **t0024** (AR(2) rho=0.6, de Rosenroll 2026): DSI traces a U-shape (0.67 -> 0.45 -> 0.62) over the same V_rest range; HWHM stays in the 65-83 deg band throughout. Depolarisation does not collapse t0024 tuning the way it collapses t0022.
* 1056 trials total (96 + 960), 4h 28m total wall time on a single Windows CPU.

## Assets Produced

* 2 predictions assets under `tasks/t0026_vrest_sweep_tuning_curves_dsgc/assets/predictions/` (1 per model)
* 18 polar plots in `results/images/`: 16 per-(model, V_rest) + 2 per-model overlays
* 2 multi-panel summary plots (DSI / peak Hz / HWHM vs V_rest)
* `results/results_summary.md`, `results/results_detailed.md`, `results/compare_literature.md`
* `results/metrics.json` with 16 explicit variants (registered keys only)
* `results/suggestions.json` with 7 follow-up suggestions (S-0026-01..07)

## Verification

- [x] All 15 step verificators passed
- [x] verify_task_metrics PASS (0 errors, 0 warnings) on the multi-variant metrics.json
- [x] verify_compare_literature PASS
- [x] verify_suggestions PASS
- [x] verify_task_results PASS
